title: daemon/relay.rs: daemon does not re-publish HPKE key or key package on relay reconnect
description: In relay.rs, the ClientEvent::Reconnected arm only logs 'relay reconnected' and broadcasts a ConnectionStateChanged event. It does NOT re-publish the daemon's HPKE public key or MLS key package to the relay after reconnect. CLI and TUI both re-publish on DirectoryList receipt after reconnect. The daemon has a DirectoryList handler that updates the contact list but does not trigger key/package re-publication. After a relay reconnect, the daemon's HPKE key and key package slots on the relay may be empty (depending on relay eviction policy), meaning other clients cannot send sealed messages to the daemon user and the admin cannot add the daemon to the MLS group. Trigger: relay restart or daemon reconnect after network interruption.
